selected_important_turn.text: I need 3 water, 2 firewood, and one food. It would be good if I got that!  🙂🙂🙂☹️☹️
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is the first concrete allocation demand and an early anchor. It immediately pushed the interaction toward a zero-sum frame (the opponent promptly said it was impossible), which shaped the whole negotiation trajectory.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: The turn is rigid and large (specific full claim) with no offer to trade or acknowledge the opponent's needs. That made rejection likely and lost an opportunity to open integrative options (e.g., trading items each side values differently). It escalated rather than invited bargaining.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Start by stating priorities and ranges rather than a full take-it-or-leave-it claim: share why items matter briefly, ask the other’s priorities, or propose multiple package options (e.g., 'I most need water — would 2–3 be possible if we split food/firewood differently?'). Signal willingness to trade rather than demand everything up front.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase — by opening space for trades instead of anchoring a zero-sum split
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase — by inviting reciprocal concessions and avoiding an extreme initial claim
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase — opponents are less likely to reflexively reject a collaborative opening
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: increase — less adversarial tone and more cooperative posture builds rapport

value2reason.Low: I am not hungry most of the time.
value2reason.Medium: I get cold easily. I might catch a cold.
value2reason.High: I am a thirsty person. Water will make me happy.

value2reason.Low: I need to eat a lot to keep up body temperature.
value2reason.Medium: I suffer greatly from the cold because I am fragile.
value2reason.High: I have a medical condition that requires me to intake a lot of water.

dialogue.text: Hello, I need supplies for the trip!🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Yep, me too🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I need 3 water, 2 firewood, and one food. It would be good if I got that!  🙂🙂🙂☹️☹️
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I understand your needs, but I require at least 2 water packages to manage my medical condition. Let’s discuss a fair split that includes 2 water, 2 firewood, and 1 food for me. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I prioritize water most, as I’m thirsty. Firewood is next for warmth, and food least. What are your needs? We could trade based on value.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need 2 water, 2 firewood, and 1 food for my medical needs and cold sensitivity. Let’s see if we can find a fair split that works for both of us.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2
